Home / Calculators
07 — Interactive Tools

Drilling Calculators

Run real drilling pressure calculations using the exact formulas taught in IWCF and IADC well control certification. Enter your well parameters and get instant results.

⚙

Hydrostatic Pressure Calculator

Calculate hydrostatic pressure, compare against pore and fracture pressure, and get an instant safe/unsafe status.

Open Calculator →
🚨

Kill Sheet Calculator

Calculate kill mud weight, formation pressure, and initial/final circulating pressure after shutting in on a kick.

Open Calculator →
📊

Mud Weight Window Calculator

Visualize your safe drilling window between pore pressure and fracture pressure gradients at any depth.

Open Calculator →
Important: These calculators are for educational and reference purposes. Always follow your company's approved procedures and consult your certified well control supervisor for actual operational decisions. Never make live well control decisions based solely on a reference tool.
